title: Unchained
description: Craft Chainmail, a new material used to create things such as chainmail armor, or the brand new Studded armor set!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8cfe9361e47aa86d5f065fdfa7f01c81598868b.png)

Now, you can craft Chainmail, a new material used to create things such as chainmail armor, or the brand new Studded armor set!

-Studded Armor: Barely better than iron and worse than diamond, it's crafted by combining leather armor pieces with chainmail armor pieces. As a special bonus, it reduces knockback, and if you're wearing a full set, you have a 15% chance of canceling any damage!

-Chainmail can be crafted by putting 4 chains in a square pattern anywhere in the crafting table, to recieve 5 chainmail!

We recommend pairing the mod with The [Hanging On](https://modrinth.com/mod/hanging-on) Mod for peak chain action!
